holdings.infoBox: SCHG is an equity ETF with a total of 197 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 11.23%, Apple at 9.63%, Microsoft at 6.53%, Amazon.com at 5.25%, and Alphabet at 4.75%.

overview.description: The Schwab U.S. Large-Cap Growth ETF (SCHG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund tracks the Dow Jones U.S. Large-Cap Growth Total Stock Market Index, which selects growth stocks from 750 of the largest U.S SCHG was launched on Dec 11, 2009 and is issued by Charles Schwab.
infoTable: Dow Jones US Total Stock Market Large-Cap Growth
